description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled dark roof and a mix of brick and light-colored siding on the exterior walls. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a small lawn with a landscaped garden, and a covered entryway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a partially covered patio area. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house has two visible stories, with a prominent garage and multiple outdoor living spaces. Architectural details include a combination of traditional and contemporary elements, such as the gabled roof, large windows, and a mix of materials.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a dark gabled roof, brick and light siding, a garage, landscaped front yard, and a backyard deck with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition to the backyard deck and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wooden deck, swimming pool, lounge area, and extensive windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage wall, side patio, and partial view of the front and back yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, a single main door, and a small overhang supported by columns
